title: Gate 32: Duration
description: You have an instinctive sense of what will last and what won't. You evaluate everything through the lens of sustainability and longevity. This gift keeps you and your community from wasting energy on dead ends.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 32 (Duration — Instinctive recognition of lasting value) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You have an instinctive sense of what will last and what won't.
You evaluate everything through the lens of sustainability and longevity.
This gift keeps you and your community from wasting energy on dead ends.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 32: Duration — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 32: Duration — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 32: Duration — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 32: Duration — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You have an instinctive sense of what will last and what won't. You evaluate everything through the lens of sustainability and longevity. This gift keeps you and your community from wasting energy on dead ends.
